title: AVIR

headings.text: Klipsch Introduces the Flexus Series Home Theater Speaker System
Flexus Core 300 Soundbar: Power and Precision
Flexus Surround 200 Speakers: Wireless and Immersive
Complete Control with the Connect Plus App

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingKlipsch's Latest For 2024Posted on September 4, 2024Klipsch Introduces the Flexus Series Home Theater Speaker SystemSeptember 3, 2024 – Klipsch is raising the bar once again with the launch of the Flexus Core 300, a 5.1.2-channel soundbar powered by Onkyo and enhanced with Dirac Live Room Correction Technology. This new release tops the Flexus Series lineup, promising an audio experience designed for serious home theater enthusiasts.‍‍Flexus Core 300 Soundbar: Power and PrecisionAt the heart of the Flexus Series is the Flexus Core 300 Soundbar, engineered to transform your home theater. With Dirac Live Room Correction Technology, this system doesn’t just adjust the sound system—it corrects your room’s acoustics, giving you more accurate, balanced sound. Expect tighter bass, improved clarity, and a true-to-life soundstage.Built with Dolby Atmos and DTS capabilities, the Flexus Core 300 is designed to fully immerse you in sound. It packs two up-firing and two side-firing 2.25-inch drivers, plus four front-firing drivers tuned by Klipsch's team of experts. For those who crave deep bass, the four built-in 4-inch subwoofers deliver serious low-end punch, all from a compact form.The soundbar also shines with dialog clarity, thanks to Klipsch’s signature horn-loaded tweeter technology in the dedicated center channel. Whether it's intense action scenes or quiet conversations, you’ll hear every word clearly, even at lower volumes.‍‍Flexus Surround 200 Speakers: Wireless and ImmersiveTo complete the system, Klipsch is introducing the Flexus Surround 200 speakers, designed with up-firing drivers for a full Dolby Atmos surround experience. These wireless surround speakers require no complicated wiring—just plug them into a wall outlet and you’re set. The lack of cables makes for a clutter-free setup without sacrificing sound quality.‍‍Flexus Sub 200: Deep, Wireless BassFor those craving even more depth, the Flexus Sub 200 offers a wireless, 12-inch high-excursion woofer that delivers rich, powerful bass. You can also link two Sub 200s to any Flexus Core soundbar, making it a bass-lover’s dream setup. The low-latency performance ensures that all the sound stays perfectly in sync, even during the most intense moments.‍‍Complete Control with the Connect Plus AppTo make operation a breeze, Klipsch has rolled out its Connect Plus app for iOS and Android devices. With one tap, you can access EQ settings, switch inputs, and update firmware. It also supports streaming through Apple AirPlay, Google Cast, Spotify, and Tidal Connect.Modular Flexibility and Easy SetupWhat sets the Flexus Series apart is its modularity. The Flexus Core 300 works seamlessly as a standalone soundbar, but you can expand your setup with optional surround speakers and subwoofers. Whether you’re upgrading to full surround sound or adding more bass, everything is designed to work together, and setup is a breeze. Klipsch’s pre-paired USB transmitter eliminates the usual setup headaches, making it easier than ever to expand your system.‍Pricing and AvailabilityFlexus Core 300 Soundbar: $999 USDFlexus Surround 200 Speakers: $399 USDFlexus Sub 200 Subwoofer: $499 USD‍The Flexus Sound System will hit stores this winter. For more details, visit Klipsch.com or dirac.com/Klipsch.‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
